Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left buttock wound site, rates 9/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 2 pressure ulcer Left buttock measures 3.8 cm x 3.2 cm x 0.3 cm.
  Wound bed: 69% slough, 31% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: none. Odor: none.
Assessment: Stage 2 pressure ulcer Left buttock — not improving.
Plan: Alginate dressing applied. Continue current dressing regimen.
